programme.title: The Messengers
programme.desc: An ominous darkness invades a farm in North Dakota, and the Solomon family is torn apart by mayhem and murder.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Returning to her childhood home, Jessabelle comes face to face with a long-tormented spirit.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: When their friend accidentally channels a mysterious signal, a group of co-eds rally to stop a terrifying evil

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: The Grudge 2
programme.desc: In Tokyo, the sister of a girl previously killed by an evil curse must learn how to stop it once and for all.

programme.title: The Grudge 3
programme.desc: A woman who holds the key to stopping the evil spirit of Kayako travels to the haunted Chicago apartment.

programme.title: All the Boys Love Mandy Lane
programme.desc: Mandy Lane, a Texas high-school beauty, is invited by her classmates to a weekend getaway at a secluded ranch.

programme.title: Teeth
programme.desc: A high school student discovers she has a physical advantage when she becomes the object of male violence.

programme.title: Cabin Fever 2: Spring Fever
programme.desc: Days after a virus consumed his friends, Paul learns the virus is spreading through a high school prom.

programme.title: Mothman
programme.desc: A group of friends hide the truth about a friend's tragic death, but an evil entity is in pursuit of them.

programme.title: The Gallows Act II
programme.desc: Ana Rue encounters a malevolent spirit after participating in a viral challenge.

programme.title: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: A take-no-trash-from-anybody matriarch tries to throw a family reunion to hold her family together.

programme.title: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: An investment banker who has been set up as the linchpin of a Ponzi scheme is relocated to Aunt Madea's home.

programme.title: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A seemingly solid marriage begins to crumble when the wife discovers her husband intends to divorce her.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
